name: io.github.haomingkoo/japan-seasons
description: Live Japan seasonal travel MCP: sakura, koyo, flowers, festivals, fruit farms, and weather.

dateStyle.description: How dates are rendered in tool output.

temperatureUnit.description: Preferred temperature unit for weather output.

includeCoordinates.description: Whether spot, festival, and farm outputs include GPS coordinates.

mapLanguage.description: Preferred language for forecast map links when both English and Japanese versions exist.

environmentVariables.name: JAPAN_SEASONS_DATE_STYLE
environmentVariables.description: How dates are rendered in tool output.

environmentVariables.name: JAPAN_SEASONS_TEMPERATURE_UNIT
environmentVariables.description: Preferred temperature unit for weather output.

environmentVariables.name: JAPAN_SEASONS_INCLUDE_COORDINATES
environmentVariables.description: Whether spot, festival, and farm outputs include GPS coordinates.

environmentVariables.name: JAPAN_SEASONS_MAP_LANGUAGE
environmentVariables.description: Preferred language for forecast map links when both English and Japanese versions exist.

environmentVariables.name: PORT
environmentVariables.description: Local port used when starting the package in HTTP MCP mode.

environmentVariables.description: Preferred temperature unit for weather output.

environmentVariables.description: Whether spot, festival, and farm outputs include GPS coordinates.

environmentVariables.description: Preferred language for forecast map links when both English and Japanese versions exist.
